title: Image-to-Markdown OCR Skill
summary: Create a new OpenCode skill (image-ocr) that extracts plain text from images and outputs clean Markdown. Two-tier architecture: Gemini 2.5 Flash primary (best quality, free tier) with Tesseract offline fallback (zero setup). Mirrors visual-ocr Gemini API patterns and doc-to-markdown batch/output patterns.
keyOutcomes: Python script ocr_extract.py supporting Gemini + Tesseract
Clean Markdown output with YAML frontmatter
Actionable error messages for missing dependencies
risks: Gemini free tier rate limits (mitigated by Tesseract fallback)
Tesseract binary not installed on target system (graceful degradation)
Large images exceeding 20MB limit (enforced with warning)
dependencies: System binary: Tesseract OCR (fallback tier only)
API key: Gemini API key (primary tier only, free tier sufficient)
Pattern reuse from visual-ocr (Gemini API integration)
validationCriteria: ocr_extract.py runs with Gemini on test image
Tesseract fallback works when Gemini key absent
Batch mode processes directory and produces manifest
Output Markdown is clean with YAML frontmatter
